message:
fix(abi-tests): merge hash_global_overwrite into hash_global_api to fix race

The standalone hash_global_overwrite test used the process-wide global hash
table (hcreate/hsearch/hdestroy) in a separate #[test] function, racing with
hash_global_api which uses the same global state. Merged into the consolidated
test to eliminate the flaky failure.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
